description: HTML source file for a web-based database viewer interface, including styles and embedded JavaScript to load and display database, table, and data information dynamically.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases from the server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases and resets UI state.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the database to show associated tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads the list of tables within a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders tabular data into the DOM.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual cell content, handling objects and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for detailed viewing.
